overall.description: First-person perspective walk along a rain-soaked desert highway in a video game. The camera moves steadily forward along the shoulder, passing under overhead road signs and continuing past a large billboard, with wet asphalt and sparse desert vegetation visible throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet highway shoulder with metal guardrail

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the left shoulder of a rain-soaked highway toward overhead sign gantries

entered.detail: metal barrier running along the left edge of the highway shoulder
large metal framework spanning the highway with directional signage
overhead directional signs displaying 'LOCAL' and arrow symbols
electrical transmission towers with multiple cables

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked highway shoulder with a metal guardrail running along the left. The camera moves forward toward large overhead sign gantries visible in the distance, with power lines visible against the grey sky on the right and sparse desert vegetation in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway sign gantry passage with support columns

events.description: passing between the support columns of the overhead sign gantries
thick metal support column temporarily blocks the forward view

agents.ego_description: navigating between the large support columns of the overhead sign structures

entered.detail: cluster of large red plastic barrels with black lids near the sign base
yellow traffic barrier positioned near the barrels

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under the massive overhead sign gantries, moving between thick metal support columns. The guardrail ends as the scene opens up, revealing red barrels and a yellow barrier on the right. The sky becomes partially obscured by the gantry structure above.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway with large advertisement billboard

events.description: passing alongside the large billboard structure on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway shoulder past the large billboard

entered.detail: tall roadside advertisement structure with multiple display panels

segments.scene_description: Beyond the sign gantries, the highway opens up completely with a large billboard visible ahead on the right. The ground transitions to reddish paved tiles. The camera continues forward, gradually approaching and then passing the tall billboard structure while distant mountains remain visible through the rain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a rain-soaked highway shoulder that transitions from a confined roadside path into an open expanse of the desert. It begins beside a metal guardrail under a grey sky, moving steadily toward massive overhead sign gantries while power lines and sparse vegetation line the horizon. As the camera passes beneath the heavy metal support columns of the gantries, the guardrail ends and the view opens up to reveal red barrels and a yellow barrier on the right. The scene then expands further as the ground shifts to reddish paved tiles, leading the camera toward a towering billboard. Finally, the movement continues past the billboard structure, keeping the distant mountains visible through the falling rain.
